hero.name: Che Amah Diland Ngwa
hero.title: Junior Backend-Software Engineer
hero.tagline: I specialize in the art of the backend where speed, security, and scalability converge. With a deep focus on the Python ecosystem, I build distributed systems designed to handle the heavy lifting of modern web apps. I am a firm believer in rigorous testing, containerized deployments, and building software that stays online when everything else goes offline.

cards.title: Services Offering
cards.content:
Custom API Development (REST, GraphQL, WebSockets)

Database Design & Schema Architecting

SaaS Backend Infrastructure

Third-Party API Integrations (Payments, CRM, Auth)

Server-Side Logic & Business Workflow Automation

Legacy Code Refactoring & Python Version Upgrades

Database Query Optimization & Performance Tuning

Cloud Deployment & Infrastructure Management (AWS, GCP, Heroku)

Containerization & DevOps Pipelines (Docker, CI/CD)

Background Task Processing & Job Queues

Authentication & Authorization Systems (OAuth2, JWT, RBAC)

Unit, Integration, and Load Testing

profile.name: CHE AMAH DILAND NGWA
profile.bio:
I am a Backend-Software Engineer and Chief Operating Officer at SAMITECH Corporation, focused on building high-impact, scalable solutions. Currently pursuing my Higher National Diploma in Software Engineering, I bridge the gap between technical execution and operational strategy.

My technical expertise is rooted in the Python ecosystem, where I specialize in developing SaaS platforms and AI/ML-driven applications. I am particularly passionate about architectural challenges, such as designing offline-first systems that ensure software remains functional and accessible in low-connectivity environments.

Technical Focus & Interests
Backend Development: Architecting robust SaaS solutions using Python.

Future-Proofing: Exploring the intersection of Machine Learning and daily automation.

Design Philosophy: I have a strong affinity for "hacker aesthetics" clean, terminal-inspired interfaces and logic-driven UI/UX.

Operational Leadership: Managing workflows and product roadmaps to turn conceptual ideas into market-ready revenue generators.
